notes:
What's new in V3.1.4:
• Cinematic AI video upgrades, Story Cutter at production scale — scripts, multicam, and /batch
• Seedance 2 — ByteDance's newest-gen model: natural motion, stable subjects, footage that feels ready to cut; stronger coherence and a more "shot-in-camera" look
• Wan 2.7 — text-to-video, image-to-video, transition mode, video edit mode, and reference mode in one family
• Story Cutter — tighter instruction following (cut to script, complex briefs); multicam for stacked synced angles; new /batch for multiple edit tasks in one run
• Fixes — large-transcript crashes; faster outputs and better token efficiency; duplicate video tracks on insert; more reliable end-to-end listening to your instructions
